catalog_content:
Item Name: Agar Agar Powder - 1 Pound - Average Gel Strength
Product Description: Agar Agar Powder 16 oz (454 grams) Average Gel Strength 700g/cm2 Agar-Agar is a natural vegetable gelatin counterpart derived from seaweed / algae (polysaccharide agarose). When prepared It forms a semi-translucent gel that can be used in culinary applications to make jellies, puddings & custards, etc. It is also useful in microbiology as the base medium for culturing bacteria and germs in petri dishes. Nutrients are added to the agar as appropriate for the specific type of microorganisms being cultured. Agar can be made into gel by adding 15 grams of agar powder to 1 liter of cold water, stir and bring the water to a boil either in a microwave or stovetop. Once it has boiled stir again and allow it to cool and become a gel. Agar Agar is a 100% Natural, Gluten Free Food
Value: 16.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Natural, gluten-free agar agar powder positioned as a versatile food additive and microbiology medium. Standard 16 oz pouch packaging with no premium or organic claims suggests mid-range pricing. Gel strength specification (700g/cm²) indicates quality focus for professional or culinary use. Competitively priced for bulk buyers in food and lab applications.
